$comment: OUTPUT STYLE — adjusts Claude's system prompt tone/format. Folder name is the style id. Select it via /output-style or the `outputStyle` settings key. This is an example; edit `instructions` to shape responses for this project.
name: example-style
description: Shown in the /output-style menu — what this style is for.
instructions: Additional instructions appended to the system prompt when this style is active. e.g. 'Prefer concise, checklist-style answers. Lead with the action, then the rationale.'
